title: Holy Grail Layout
description:
Write CSS to implement the classic **Holy Grail layout** using CSS Grid with named grid areas.

### Visual Target

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────┐
│              Header                  │
├──────┬────────────────────┬──────────┤
│ Nav  │                    │  Aside   │
│      │     Main Content   │          │
│      │                    │          │
├──────┴────────────────────┴──────────┤
│              Footer                  │
└──────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Requirements

- `.holy-grail` uses CSS Grid with `grid-template-areas`
- Grid areas: `"header header header"` / `"nav main aside"` / `"footer footer footer"`
- Grid columns: `12rem 1fr 12rem`
- The layout fills the full viewport height (`min-height: 100vh`)
- Main content row gets the remaining space (`1fr`)
- Header: background `#1e293b`, colour white, `1rem 1.5rem` padding
- Nav: background `#f1f5f9`, `1.25rem` padding, right border `1px solid #e2e8f0`
- Aside: background `#f1f5f9`, `1.25rem` padding, left border `1px solid #e2e8f0`
- Main: `2rem` padding, background white
- Footer: background `#1e293b`, colour white, `1rem 1.5rem` padding, text centre

### Test IDs

| Element | data-testid |
|---------|-------------|
| Grid wrapper | `holy-grail` |
| Header | `header` |
| Nav | `nav` |
| Main | `main` |
| Aside | `aside` |
| Footer | `footer` |
constraints:
- Only edit styles.css
- Must use grid-template-areas for layout (not just column/row placement)
- Layout must fill the viewport height
hints: Define grid-template-areas with three rows: header spanning all 3 columns, nav/main/aside in the middle, footer spanning all 3.
Use grid-template-rows: auto 1fr auto to make the middle row fill remaining space.
Each grid child uses grid-area: header / nav / main / aside / footer to place itself.
